name: deskpal-desktop
description: Desktop pixel companions inspired by DeskPal.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/overlay.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/characters.js && node --check src/interaction-variety.js && node --check scripts/generate-icon.cjs && node --check scripts/package-mac.cjs && node --check scripts/package-platform.cjs && node --check scripts/package-deb.cjs && node --check scripts/package-dmg.cjs && node --check scripts/verify-bubble-position.cjs && node --check scripts/verify-care-system.cjs && node scripts/verify-bubble-position.cjs && node scripts/verify-care-system.cjs
scripts.package:all: npm run check && npm run package:mac && npm run package:win && npm run package:linux
scripts.archive:all: npm run archive:mac && npm run archive:win && npm run archive:linux
scripts.release:ubuntu: npm run package:linux && npm run archive:linux && npm run package:deb
scripts.release:ubuntu:arm64: npm run package:linux:arm64 && npm run archive:linux:arm64 && npm run package:deb:arm64
scripts.release:local: npm run package:all && npm run archive:all
scripts.installer:desktop: npm run installer:win && npm run installer:mac
